title: nvme-cli command metadata
description: Schema for the JSON emitted by `nvme dump-command-metadata`, which describes every command and its accepted options for tooling such as shell-completion generators, documentation, and drift checks.

schema_version.description: Bumped on any breaking change to the output structure. Consumers should reject a major version they do not understand.

version.description: Program version string. Omitted if unknown.

plugins.description: Named plugins, each grouping its own commands.

name.description: Plugin name, used as the first argument to dispatch its commands.
Command name as typed on the command line.

alias.description: Alternate name accepted for the command. Omitted if none.

description.description: Command description (the command-list one-liner). Omitted if unset.

options.description: Options the command accepts. Empty for commands that take no options.

long.description: Long option name, without the leading "--".

short.description: Single-character short option name, without the leading "-". Omitted if none.

argument.description: Whether the option consumes an argument.

metavar.description: Placeholder name for the option's value (e.g. "NUM", "FMT"). Present only for options that take a value.

description.description: Option help text. Omitted if unset.

global.description: True for the shared global options appended to every command (verbose, output-format, timeout, ...). Absent otherwise.

hidden.description: True for options accepted on the command line but suppressed from --help. Absent otherwise.

values.description: The set of values the parser enforces for this option, when it constrains them to a fixed set. Absent when the value is unconstrained.
